goal: Close more of the remaining real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker by making CUDA adapter creation reproducible before the existing RC handoff. Harden the LLaMA-Factory CUDA config so lora_rank/lora_alpha are explicit, and add an operator-facing preparation script that writes the canonical dataset conversion and backend_config.yaml for a real external CUDA training run without claiming release GO.
head: 30a3b11
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Replacing the existing worker-owned training job path
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the LLaMA-Factory config builder, a standalone preparation script, focused tests/golden config, current review evidence, WORKING.md, and this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: LLaMA-Factory backend_config.yaml includes explicit lora_rank and lora_alpha from the selected preset
Training handoff preparation script emits JSON/Markdown/Shell artifacts without running fake training or claiming release GO
Generated shell runs llamafactory-cli train, writes/verifies manifest/intake, then points to the existing CUDA RC handoff
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the release blocker
No model weights or adapter files are committed
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until the generated training handoff is run on a real CUDA host and produces a real adapter plus no-fake endpoint evidence.
This gate prepares real training artifacts only; it does not run LLaMA-Factory training in the current host.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped gate after finding the remaining blocker requires a real CUDA adapter before the RC handoff, while current local host lacks nvidia-smi and mib-export:test. Also found lora_rank/lora_alpha were calculated but not written into the CUDA backend config.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING/CONTEXT, v0 readiness audit, CUDA RC handoff, run_m6_real_adapter_rc_gate.py, LLaMA-Factory runtime, CUDA train handler, and SSOT/spec sections for M3/M6. Confirmed Docker daemon is reachable with escalation but mib-export:test is absent, nvidia-smi is unavailable locally, and the remaining release blocker still requires real external CUDA adapter evidence.
phase_notes.build: Added explicit lora_rank/lora_alpha to services/worker/runtime/llamafactory.py backend_config and updated the golden YAML. Added scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py to prepare canonical LLaMA-Factory dataset/config artifacts and generate JSON/Markdown/Shell operator handoff for actual CUDA training, manifest finalization, adapter intake, and downstream RC handoff.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused CUDA wrapper + preparation script pytest, generated real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff JSON/Markdown/Shell artifacts, JSON validation, shell bash -n, marker rg, v0 readiness expected NOT_GO, v0 JSON validation, hook-required .venv m1-smoke bootstrap, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: CUDA real-adapter training handoff gate is complete. Current local evidence remains NOT_GO because the script has not been run on a real CUDA host and no model weights/adapters are committed.

pabcd.approved_scope: LLaMA-Factory config builder, standalone CUDA training preparation script, focused tests/golden config, review evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No API/UI/DB/product behavior changes outside CUDA config generation, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
